nodes.long_description:
Quest 2 Game made in Unity with the Cesium Package using the Google Earth Photogrammetry 3d Tiles.

---------------------------------------------
UPDATE v10 !! : hopefully the MOST STABLE and the Update that Simplified the Flight Controlling Mechanic the Most, v10 is meant to finalize the heavy game development for a month or two, however, fixes and improvements will still come if there are any needs for it. this Update adds Controller SUPPORT!!! basically the rest is self explanatory, the update also fixes a bug that due to the collider removal and raycast to prevent going through mesh, even if the Earth's Mesh was not visible in Space, it was still there, so the raycast stopped Player Movement when trying to go down, this was Fortunately FIXED!,

v10.2: the Controllers are now Able to Type on Keyboard to Search and Teleport to a specific Place on Earth, and fixed a bug where the space bar touch collider was small,

v10.3: when you pressed on some specific ui buttons, the code gave an error and every other ui stopped working since they had the same script. this was fixed. 3d Earth Generation to have better quality and faster performance, also loading faster and in larger quantity, we'll have to know if that's the case, if not we'll have to redo the changes in v10.4 :/, another improvement was that flight speed adjustment based on altitude was not efficient, and sometimes caused teleporting instead of flying smoothly, fixed !
https://youtu.be/6s-jkai4_mA
---------------------
nodes.short_description: geography teaching hand tracking passthrough VR app/game on Quest 2 Quest Pro, and Quest 3

nodes.change_log:
v38 is LIVE !

This update isn't small, but a big part of it is into the small things, optimizing for maximum performance, ensuring everything offers the most possible utility, refining UI elements for clarity and design, and improving tiny but important aspects overall.

Immersive Mode Upgrades

- Realistic Night Sky:
Realistic & natural star fields, long exposure mechanic ( star trails ) for fast Sky Speeds + more...
- More 'Sky Rotation Speed' control accuracy;

Beautiful new Soundtrack
Listen here: https://youtu.be/7rcSd54dU68

Let me know if there are any issues ( contact.earthquest.site )

( video )

Beautiful new Soundtrack

Let me know if there are any issues ( contact.earthquest.site )

v37 Released !

Introducing a game-changing new feature that offers

BETTER 3D Map Quality

Yup, you heard that right, this seemed impossible to work on standalone mobile VR due to the immense computation needed for this type of task

And it was, almost impossible, but with many advanced optimization methods I'm happy to announce that 
EarthQuest manages to do this with the same fluid performance as before !

Additional

- 'Preferences' redesign ! 

- MASSIVE Improvement to movement freedom and fluidity when colliding with 3D surfaces.

- 3D Map Quality and Loading settings will now provide a single, compact, more useful Performance Warning guiding you while adjusting your preferred Quality & Performance

- AI Voice Recording is now more reliable and should now last until completely stopped talking

- You can now switch from the largest Player Scale to Human-Scale & vice versa, IN JUST ONE PRESS !

- Fully supported DMS coordinate format for loading coordinates via 'Search for Place'

--

v37.52:

Polished a broad range of additions from v35-v37 versions and more.

Update now to get the most stable and satisfying experience yet in every aspect. 

--
let me know ( contact.earthquest.site )
if you encounter anything that you may think isn't intended !
